create_OatPromptChoices: create an OatPromptChoices model to store matched actions prompts and source file results
create_OatConfig: create an OatConfig instance that loads and indexes a repo uses JSON file
get_prompt_choices: get prompt choices by matching a user prompt prefix against indexed repo actions
get_best_matches_bm25: get the best matching actions for a prompt using BM25Okapi scoring and top-k retrieval
review_OatConfig_get_prompt_choices: review the OatConfig get_prompt_choices method to understand prefix matching and tool result scoring
